hooks.command: echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] BASH: $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" >> /root/.claude/audit.log && CMD=$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm -rf [^t]|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|git push --force|truncate -s 0)'; then echo "WARNING: DANGEROUS COMMAND DETECTED - confirm with user before proceeding."; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$ ]] && command -v npx &>/dev/null; then cd $PWD && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

python3 /usr/local/claude-scripts/metrics-hook.py stop "$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID" "$PWD" 2>/dev/null || true && cd $PWD 2>/dev/null && mkdir -p .claude && { echo "--- Session ended $(date) ---"; git diff --stat 2>/dev/null || echo '(no git repo)'; } >> .claude/session-log.md
